gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/45)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/45)
text: جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَدَّعِي عَلَى الْمُعَلَّى بْنِ خُنَيْسٍ دَيْناً عَلَيْهِ فَقَالَ ذَهَبَ بِحَقِّي فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) ذَهَبَ بِحَقِّكَ الَّذِي قَتَلَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ لِلْوَلِيدِ قُمْ إِلَى الرَّجُلِ فَاقْضِهِ مِنْ حَقِّهِ فَإِنِّي أُرِيدُ أَنْ أُبَرِّدَ عَلَيْهِ جِلْدَهُ الَّذِي كَانَ بَارِداً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Al Waleed Bin Sabeeh who said,

‘A man came over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> demanding a debt which was upon Al-Moalla Bin Khunays, so he said, ‘He has gone away with my right’. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘It was the one who killed him that went away with your right’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said to Al-Waleed: ‘Stand up to the man, so fulfil his right, for I<sup>asws</sup> wanted that his skin be cooled upon him which was already cold’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-‘ Abbas the one whom he has mentioned (in his book) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Imam pays off the debts of the believing people except Muhur (dowry) of women.’”
